mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, payment_intent_id, buyer_id, merchant_account, processing_model, total_amount_value, currency, captured_amount_value, refunded_amount_value, status, splits_json::text AS splits_json, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE payment_id = #{id}

SELECT payment_id, payment_intent_id, buyer_id, merchant_account, processing_model, total_amount_value, currency, captured_amount_value, refunded_amount_value, status, splits_json::text AS splits_json, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE payment_intent_id = #{paymentIntentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( payment_id, payment_intent_id, buyer_id, merchant_account, processing_model, total_amount_value, captured_amount_value, refunded_amount_value, currency, status, splits_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{paymentIntentId}, #{buyerId}, #{merchantAccount}, #{processingModel}, #{totalAmountValue}, #{capturedAmountValue}, #{refundedAmountValue}, #{currency}, #{status}, CAST(#{splitsJson} AS jsonb), #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt,typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler} )

INSERT INTO payments ( payment_id, payment_intent_id, buyer_id, merchant_account, processing_model, total_amount_value, captured_amount_value, refunded_amount_value, currency, status, splits_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{paymentIntentId}, #{buyerId}, #{merchantAccount}, #{processingModel}, #{totalAmountValue}, #{capturedAmountValue}, #{refundedAmountValue}, #{currency}, #{status}, CAST(#{splitsJson} AS jsonb), #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt,typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler} ) ON CONFLICT (payment_id) DO UPDATE SET captured_amount_value = EXCLUDED.captured_amount_value, refunded_amount_value = EXCLUDED.refunded_amount_value, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
